noncompete_overrides.California: Post-term noncompete may not be enforceable; no-poach will not be enforced

termination_overrides.Indiana: Unilateral termination without good cause prohibited
termination_overrides.Wisconsin: 90-day notice, 60-day cure (WI Fair Dealership Act Ch. 135)

release_overrides.Hawaii: Does not relieve from HI franchise law
release_overrides.Indiana: Does not relieve from IN franchise law
release_overrides.Maryland: Does not apply to MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
release_overrides.North Dakota: Release requirement on renewal deleted entirely
